#  Payee Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Paid Accounts - Accept Employee Request 
  1. Navigate to the company's **Directory** tool.
  2. Click the **In Review** tab.
  3. Select the user's **Project** and **Company Permissions Templates**.
  4. Do one of the following:
     * Click **Accept** to approve.
     * Click **Decline** to decline the request.


#####  Note
For companies setting up **Procore Pay** :
  * If accepted, only [Company Admins](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-company-admin) or users with 'Admin' level permissions to the Company Directory can see the Payments tool. They can [add a bank account](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-setup-guide/add-your-bank-account) continue setting up Procore Pay.
  * If denied, the Payments tool will not be enabled.


For the full setup process, see the [Payee Setup Guide](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-setup-guide/).
